title: Generate TTS and speak in VC

log.context: Generate TTS and speak in VC

The TTS clip was generated successfully.

**Generated audio file:** `/tmp/vc-test.wav` (240 KB, voice: `bm_george`)

The `kokoro-speak.py` script doesn't accept an output path argument -- it takes `<text> [voice]` and prints the temp file path to stdout. I used it correctly and copied the result to `/tmp/vc-test.wav`.

To play it in Discord VC, use the `speak` tool with path `/tmp/vc-test.wav` (you may need to `join_voice` first).
